mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_history (supplier_id, supplier_name, credit_code, contact_phone, address, rating, tags, is_qualified, legal_person, registered_capital, establishment_date, business_scope, operation, operator_id, operator_name, operation_time) VALUES (#{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{creditCode}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{rating}, #{tags}, #{isQualified}, #{legalPerson}, #{registeredCapital}, #{establishmentDate}, #{businessScope}, #{operation}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, NOW())
